tenant.hero_title: The Best Cakes, Delivered to Your Door.
tenant.hero_desc: Enjoy a variety of premium cakes and sweet treats made with the finest ingredients from {name}.
tenant.top_selections_desc: Our most recommended products curated just for you.
tenant.footer_welcome: Welcome to {name}, we are ready to serve your orders anytime.

platform.hero_desc: The all-in-one scalable, professional e-commerce platform for bakeries, restaurants, and modern businesses. Manage multiple stores seamlessly from a single dashboard.
platform.features_desc: Everything you need to run, scale, and manage your online business effortlessly.
platform.feat1_desc: Host hundreds of independent stores on a single platform. Each tenant gets their own subdomain, themes, and fully isolated data.
platform.feat2_desc: Built on Next.js 15+ and optimized for speed. Ensure your customers enjoy a frictionless shopping experience that boosts conversions.
platform.feat3_desc: A beautiful UI designed to work perfectly across all devices, from desktop browsers to native mobile experiences.
platform.merchants_desc: Explore some of the amazing businesses powered by the Bitespace platform.
platform.no_merchants: No active merchants found on the platform yet.
platform.btn_create_first: Be the first to create a store! →
platform.footer_desc: The premier platform for multitenant e-commerce and store management.
